Salesforce Scout v1 — Vantaca - NB - Sales - 2026

OPPORTUNITY SNAPSHOT
- EIC ID (if updating): 
- Account: Vantaca
- Opportunity: Vantaca - NB - Sales - 2026
- Opportunity Link: https://launchdarkly.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006TR00000Y4cntYAB/view
- Stage: 5 - Paper Process
- Stage Bucket: Late
- Motion: Net-new
- AE Owner: Corey Frassica
- Experimentation Team Engaged?: Yes
- AI Configs Adjacent?: Unknown
- Competitive Mention?: Unknown
- Exec Sponsor Mentioned?: Yes (Jeff (CTO))
- Next Checkpoint: 2026-04-15
- Amount: $28,000
- Expected Revenue: $23,800
- Probability: 85%

EVIDENCE
1) Source Type: Salesforce
  Source Link: https://launchdarkly.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006TR00000Y4cntYAB/view
  Snippet: "They are currently running a LaunchDarkly trial."

2) Source Type: Salesforce Activity
  Source Link: https://launchdarkly.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006TR00000Y4cntYAB/view/activities
  Snippet: "03/27 - CF Received final approval from Jeff (CTO). Docusign and final quote sent over. Once we get the signature I will CW this opp.
03/24 - CF Quotes sent over to Conner (VP) and Jeff (CTO) for final approvals - call scheduled Friday to discuss
03/20 - CF Second pricing call with team - 33,750 will be final offer - VP and CTO asked for quotes to be sent over for both 1 yr and 3 yr
03/13 - Pricing call with Vantaca team - SC total will be updated and sent over to us. Price point will change upon new number. Call scheduled for 03/18 to discuss new price point. Deal updated to 35k iARR
02/28 CF - Trial extended until 03/21 as commercial conversations kick off. Pricing call scheduled for 03/13
02/05 CF - Weekly syncs scheduled for every Friday with Scott S from LaunchX - Support them during the trial/POV process
02/03 CF Agreed on extending trial to end of Feb - Working session was useful and they were wowed by product/experimentation capabilities - setting up weekly office hours during trial process to keep momentum/help with any questions that come up
02/02 CF Working session scheduled with Vantaca team for 02/03 - Scott + Matt as technical experts
01/30 CF Schedule joint working session with LaunchDarkly SE + LaunchX (Experimentation Expert) to support Vantaca's 2-3 month POC. Goal is to finalize experimentation setup, validate architecture, and launch first production-facing experiment within ~2 weeks"

3) Source Type: Business Impact
  Source Link: https://launchdarkly.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006TR00000Y4cntYAB/view/impact
  Snippet: "They need to discuss pricing as soon as possible and want to schedule a call to move things forward. Their VP of Engineering and Product Manager would like to join the discussion to evaluate production readiness and next steps."

4) Source Type: LaunchX
  Source Link: https://launchdarkly.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006TR00000Y4cntYAB/view/launchx
  Snippet: "Scott - Demo on 2/3
https://us-13341.app.gong.io/call?id=5106596550380097668"

5) Source Type: Salesforce Note
  Source Link: https://launchdarkly.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006TR00000Y4cntYAB/view/notes/1
  Snippet: "03/27 - CF Received final approval from Jeff (CTO). Docusign and final quote sent over."

6) Source Type: Salesforce Note
  Source Link: https://launchdarkly.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006TR00000Y4cntYAB/view/notes/2
  Snippet: "02/03 CF Agreed on extending trial to end of Feb - Working session was useful and they were wowed by product/experimentation capabilities."

NOTES
- 03/27 - CF Received final approval from Jeff (CTO). Docusign and final quote sent over.
- 02/03 CF Agreed on extending trial to end of Feb - Working session was useful and they were wowed by product/experimentation capabilities.
- 01/30 CF Goal is to finalize experimentation setup, validate architecture, and launch first production-facing experiment within ~2 weeks
- NEXT_STEPS: 03/27 - CF Received final approval from Jeff (CTO). Docusign and final quote sent over. Once we get the signature I will CW this opp.
03/24 - CF Quotes sent over to Conner (VP) and Jeff (CTO) for final approvals - call scheduled Friday to discuss
03/20 - CF Second pricing call with team - 33,750 will be final offer - VP and CTO asked for quotes to be sent over for both 1 yr and 3 yr
03/13 - Pricing call with Vantaca team - SC total will be updated and sent over to us. Price point will change upon new number. Call scheduled for 03/18 to discuss new price point. Deal updated to 35k iARR
02/28 CF - Trial extended until 03/21 as commercial conversations kick off. Pricing call scheduled for 03/13
02/05 CF - Weekly syncs scheduled for every Friday with Scott S from LaunchX - Support them during the trial/POV process
02/03 CF Agreed on extending trial to end of Feb - Working session was useful and they were wowed by product/experimentation capabilities - setting up weekly office hours during trial process to keep momentum/help with any questions that come up
02/02 CF Working session scheduled with Vantaca team for 02/03 - Scott + Matt as technical experts
01/30 CF Schedule joint working session with LaunchDarkly SE + LaunchX (Experimentation Expert) to support Vantaca's 2-3 month POC. Goal is to finalize experimentation setup, validate architecture, and launch first production-facing experiment within ~2 weeks
- BUSINESS_IMPACT: They need to discuss pricing as soon as possible and want to schedule a call to move things forward. Their VP of Engineering and Product Manager would like to join the discussion to evaluate production readiness and next steps.
- LAUNCHX: Scott - Demo on 2/3
https://us-13341.app.gong.io/call?id=5106596550380097668

Salesforce Scout v1 — Grant Thornton International - NB -  - Sales - 2025

OPPORTUNITY SNAPSHOT
- EIC ID (if updating): 
- Account: Grant Thornton International
- Opportunity: Grant Thornton International - NB -  - Sales - 2025
- Opportunity Link: https://launchdarkly.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006TR00000MC2CfYAL/view
- Stage: 4 - EB Approval
- Stage Bucket: Late
- Motion: Net-new
- AE Owner: Mike Mygal
- Experimentation Team Engaged?: No
- AI Configs Adjacent?: Yes
- Competitive Mention?: Unknown (No direct competitors were mentioned.

The team has prior experience with LaunchDarkly, indicating existing familiarity and potentially some internal preference, which reduces competitive risk.)
- Exec Sponsor Mentioned?: Unknown
- Next Checkpoint: 2026-04-17
- Amount: $67,000
- Expected Revenue: $40,200
- Probability: 60%

EVIDENCE
1) Source Type: Salesforce
  Source Link: https://launchdarkly.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006TR00000MC2CfYAL/view
  Snippet: "No experimentation practices were mentioned.

Since the focus is on feature flags, it's likely they are at an early stage or have not yet formalized experimentation strategies."

2) Source Type: Salesforce Activity
  Source Link: https://launchdarkly.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006TR00000MC2CfYAL/view/activities
  Snippet: "3/30- Finalizing final redlines this week
3/16 - Filling out vendor form - they asked for call with legal for redlines so sent available times for mtg this week.
3/8-Met with Joe and Marige from sourcing. They sent us a form to redline and set another call to connect on 3/11 to track progress.
2/9 Met with GTIL tech and procurement and they are ready to move forward but will need to redline our MSA. I have submitted a request for exception since it falls below the $75k threshold
11/10 Need to update with AI configs. Legal is looking at our MNDA. Timing could be at risk since they have to look at all our docs
11/7/25 Pricing overview and RSA scoping.
Customer would like to sign in December and have net 45 in order to pay in Jan
10/28 Budget is finally confirmed, need to review online terms, order is being evaluated
9/10 Working on budget
7/2 Meeting in next couple weeks to scope and discovery"

3) Source Type: Business Impact
  Source Link: https://launchdarkly.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006TR00000MC2CfYAL/view/impact
  Snippet: "The prospect is seeking a better understanding of how LaunchDarkly works, which could indicate a gap in tooling or process familiarity that's slowing down adoption or optimization of releases.

There may be inefficiencies or inconsistencies in rollout strategies if feature flags are not yet in place."

  Snippet: "No direct competitors were mentioned.

The team has prior experience with LaunchDarkly, indicating existing familiarity and potentially some internal preference, which reduces competitive risk."

  Snippet: "3/30- Finalizing final redlines this week"

  Source Link: https://launchdarkly.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006TR00000MC2CfYAL/view/notes/2
  Snippet: "2/9 Met with GTIL tech and procurement and they are ready to move forward but will need to redline our MSA."

- 2/9 Met with GTIL tech and procurement and they are ready to move forward but will need to redline our MSA.

Salesforce Scout v1 — Ferguson Home - Expansion - Sales - 2025

OPPORTUNITY SNAPSHOT
- EIC ID (if updating):

- Stage Bucket: Closed

EVIDENCE
1) Source Type: Salesforce
  Source Link: https://launchdarkly.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006TR00000PBI3FYAX/view
  Snippet: "2/3: they have the pricing from Sitespect- talking with CIO about it; meeting with procurement on thursday for path forward"

2) Source Type: Salesforce Activity
  Source Link: https://launchdarkly.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006TR00000PBI3FYAX/view/activities
  Snippet: "3/25: routing for signatures on their end
3/24: came back to the table and said if we can do sub $100k deal for unlimited MAU and 25 extra seats we can get a deal done; draft OF sent over for approval on numbers
2/9: procurement out today unexpectedly going to try to catch him on tues if he's back. they had a meeting on friday to discuss a path forward
2/3: they have the pricing from Sitespect- talking with CIO about it; meeting with procurement on thursday for path forward
1/26: talked with procurement last week - they are meeting with other vendor today and tomorrow, he said to follow up by EOD. they need some idea on price changes with other vendor and then this should be approved and off for signature
1/20: followed up with procurement again today- still waiting to hear about the cost of Ferguson Home splitting off from Sitespect
1/15: FU with procurement to get an update
1/13: procurement reached out saying leadership is trying to understand if/how the contract will change with other vendor if they pull Ferguson Home- asked about the risk of Ferguson Home not moving at all
1/12: reached out to procurement on Thurs for update- he had mentioned they will have decision by EOW. most likely moving forward with just Ferguson Home
1/2: they couldn't get approval to have Ferguson Home move on separate tools by EOY, they are still considering the proposal, talking with procurement again on monday
12/22: we are struggling with Ferguson.com getting onboard (ferguson home is bought in); we offered up a sweetheart deal to get this done, procurement is helping us, with a deadline for decision by EOD tomorrow.
12/15: working through pricing and whether or not ferguson.com will be on onboarding now vs later; updated proposals sent on Friday for MAU vs Keys; meeting with Zilker on Wed
12/8: meeting tues with team to align on product gaps and meeting set with Zilker next week
12/1: meeting with procurement on Tues
11/25: exec wrap up went well, product meeting today; working to schedule time with procurement next week to review proposal; order form has been sent
11/17: extended PoV again to go through metrics on Thurs to ensure they line up with what we are showing. Exec wrap up on Friday
11/10: extended PoV- results session on Thursday; Exec wrap up on Friday- met with procurement last week, working through proposal
11/3: Currently in exp PoV, ending on 11/7 with exec wrap up; working w/ procurement on pricing- most likely will need more seats w/ exp MAU
9/2: FU this week
8/25: followed up on Friday, no response
8/18: Followed up last week to get time on the cal for kick off- will follow up again this week
8/12- champion was on vacation, working to FU to schedule POV Scoping session with broader team"

3) Source Type: Salesforce Note
  Source Link: https://launchdarkly.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006TR00000PBI3FYAX/view/notes/1
  Snippet: "11/3: Currently in exp PoV, ending on 11/7 with exec wrap up; working w/ procurement on pricing- most likely will need more seats w/ exp MAU"
